sglang.title: Cache nvidia wheels locally to skip repeated 830 MB downloads in CI

Add scripts/ci/cuda/cache_nvidia_wheels.sh: downloads wheels via curl to a persistent local directory (/r

sglang.title: Increase hicache eval to 200 examples
sglang.author: hnyls2002
sglang.bodyExcerpt: Increase GSM8K examples from 50 to 200 in hicache consistency test. With 50 examples each sample is worth 0.02, causing flaky score diffs > 0.03 threshold. With 200 examples, locally verified diff = 0.01 < 0.03.

sglang.title: [MPS] Fix Triton stub sub-module imports on Python 3.12+
sglang.author: karanb192
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

On macOS/MPS, SGLang installs a Triton stub very early so that import triton succeeds even though real Triton is unavailable.
In the reproduced torch==2.9.1 environment, PyTorch's has_triton_package() only checks whether import triton succeeds. That allows later startup paths

sglang.title: [KDA] Fuse scaled_dot_kkt + solve_tril + recompute_w_u for KDA
sglang.author: yuan-luo
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
This PR is inspired by #21411.
The previous KDA prefill pipeline required three sequential kernel dispatches:

chunk_kda_scaled_dot_kkt_fwd — compute the intra-chunk attention matrices (Aqk, Akk)
solve_tril — solve the lower-triangular system on Akk
recompute_w_u_fwd — recompute w, u, kg

vllm.title: [CI] Avoid concurrent docker pull in intel XPU CI runners to prevent rate limit issues
vllm.author: wendyliu235
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose

Uses /tmp/docker-pull.lock as a global lock
Double-checks image existence after acquiring lock
Adds timeout to prevent hanging pulls

Example Scenario
Before:

4 runners → 4 concurrent pulls → rate limit hit ❌

After:

4 runners → 1 pull + 3 reuse → stable ✅

Testing

Verified on multi-runn

vllm.title: fix: clamp dA_cumsum differences to prevent Inf in Mamba2 SSD kernels
vllm.author: kibitzing
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Clamp dA_cumsum differences to non-positive before exponentiation in Mamba2 SSD Triton kernels to prevent Inf.
When a Mamba2 model has large |A| values, dA_cumsum reaches magnitudes where float32 ULP exceeds safe range. The parallel prefix scan (tl.cumsum) can introduce rounding errors that

vllm.title: [Fix] handle PaddleOCR-VL image processor max_pixels across Transformers v4/v5
vllm.author: zhang-prog
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR fixes max_pixels handling for PaddleOCR-VL across different Transformers versions.
This difference is version-related:

with Transformers 4.x, PaddleOCR-VL must be loaded with trust_remote_code=True, and max_pixels is available as image_processor.max_pixels
with the Transformers-native imple

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix FusedMoE weight loading with padded hidden dimensions
vllm.author: SandishKumarHN
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
Fixes #36926
When DeepEP/NIXL EP backends round up hidden_size for alignment (e.g., 2688 → 3072), FusedMoE weight parameters are allocated with the padded size but
checkpoint weights have the original size. This causes RuntimeError: The size of tensor a (3072) must match the size of tensor b
